topicDefinition.oneLiner: Turn blog posts, podcasts, and long-form content into engaging videos.
boundaries: Must have explicit features for importing existing assets (URLs, long videos, podcasts, text).
Must automate the conversion of one format to another (e.g., text to video, long video to shorts).
Excludes basic text-to-video generators that cannot ingest long-form URLs or podcast audio files.

howToChoose.title: Match Input to Output
howToChoose.desc: If you are starting with text (blogs/articles), you need tools like Lumen5 or Pictory. If starting with long video/audio, look at Opus Clip or Munch.

howToChoose.title: Check Transcript Editing Quality
howToChoose.desc: For audio/video repurposing, ensure the tool offers transcript-based editing where deleting text automatically cuts the corresponding media.

howToChoose.title: Evaluate B-roll Libraries
howToChoose.desc: Blog-to-video tools rely heavily on stock media. Ensure the platform has access to high-quality libraries (like Storyblocks or Getty) included in the price.

sources.title: Pictory vs Lumen5: The Ultimate 2026 AI Video Generator Comparison
sources.excerpt: A deep comparison between two of the most popular text-to-video and content repurposing tools.

sections.heading: Top Tools by Use Case
sections.content: Pictory excels at converting scripts, articles, and long-form recordings into platform-ready clips featuring transcript-based editing. Lumen5 is optimized for fast blog-to-video conversion by pasting a URL.

toolMentions.bestFor: Podcasts, webinars, and long-form script conversion
keyClaims: Features transcript-based editing where editing text automatically edits the video
limitations: Complex credit system and occasional export issues
proofSnippets: Pictory excels at converting scripts, articles, and long-form recordings into platform-ready clips. It features transcript-based editing... making it ideal for podcasts and webinars.

keyClaims: Simply paste a URL and the AI builds scenes with stock media and text animations
Best for social media managers needing high-volume output quickly
proofSnippets: Lumen5 is optimized for fast blog-to-video conversion. Simply paste a URL and the AI builds scenes with stock media and text animations automatically.

notes: Excellent breakdown of the text/blog repurposing market.

sources.title: Lumen5 Official Pricing and Limits
sources.excerpt: Official details on Lumen5's free tier, watermarks, and refund guarantees.

sections.heading: Watermark
sections.content: The free plan includes Lumen5 branding in videos. Paid plans allow you to remove Lumen5 branding.

watermarkRules: Free plan includes Lumen5 branding in videos
exportRules: Video resolution options are restricted by plan tier
refundRules: Offers a 7-day money-back guarantee via support request
limitations: No monthly limits on video creation at any subscription level
proofSnippets: Lumen5 offers a 7-day money-back guarantee. If you're unhappy with a paid subscription within 7 days, you can request a full refund.
There are no monthly limits on video creation at any subscription level.

notes: Unique insight that Lumen5 does not cap monthly video creations, unlike competitors.

sources.title: Best AI Content Repurposing Software In 2026
sources.excerpt: A review of video clippers and text repurposing software.

sections.heading: Top Tools by Use Case
sections.content: Munch is ranked as best for trend-optimized clipping without requiring technical skills. Opus Clip ranks as a top choice for turning long videos into shorts with a virality score.

keyClaims: Best for trend-optimized clipping without requiring technical skills
Automatically extracts engaging moments from long-form videos
proofSnippets: Munch is ranked as best for trend-optimized clipping without requiring technical skills.

keyClaims: Turns long videos into shorts with a virality score
proofSnippets: Opus Clip ranks as a top choice for turning long videos into shorts with a 'virality score'.

notes: Identifies Munch and Opus Clip as the leaders in long-to-short clipping.
